title: Quick Start Guide - Osprey/Tern - First screen, single earbud/pairing - zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide zoom in/out functionality fails on the pairing screen when tapping the blue circle button
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Home → Device Settings → Quick Start Guide.
Tap the blue circle button on the Quick Start Guide screen.
Observe the earbud image on screen.
Tap the blue circle button again.
Observe the earbud image on screen.
expected: 1. After tapping the blue circle button the first time, the earbud image zooms in and the on-screen text matches the Figma Pairing screen design. 2. After tapping the blue circle button the second time, the screen zooms out to the original view.
